description_long: This is a large, multi-story suburban house surrounded by a wooden fence and mature trees, with a spacious driveway leading to a double garage. The house features a complex roofline with multiple gables and dormers, as well as several balconies and terraces. The front yard includes a manicured lawn, flower beds, and a gated entryway. The rear of the house has additional outdoor living spaces, including a patio and rooftop deck. Numerous windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A large, multi-story suburban house with gabled roofs, balconies, a double garage, and a fenced yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and a gated entry flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, multiple balconies, and the arrangement of trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, rooftop deck, and additional windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear garden, more trees, and the complex roof structure.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern suburban elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, double doors, steps, and decorative columns flanked by landscaping.
